# Kiro Spec — README + Hero UI v0.6.0 sync

**Status:** READY FOR KIRO EXECUTION
**Generated by:** Claude Opus 4.7 (planning) for Kiro IDE execution.
**Goal:** Sync the public-facing surfaces (README badge, README body, hero UI
stat tiles, hero UI CTAs) to v0.6.0 "Watch & Prove" so the live numbers
match the actual published release.

> This is a **surgical update** — 4 small edits, no refactor, no new files.
> All four edits must be applied as a single atomic commit titled
> `docs(ui): sync README + hero UI to v0.6.0 published numbers`.

---

## Context

`@apohara/synthex@0.6.0` was published to npm with SLSA L3 + npm provenance
on 2026-05-28. The `main` branch at HEAD `53f429d` has the new code, but
the README badge + hero UI stat tiles still display **v0.5.0 numbers**
(stale). Empirically verified by `grep` on 2026-05-28:

| Location | Current (stale) | Should be |
|---|---|---|
| `README.md:11` badge | `tests-162 · 152 pass · 10 skip` | `tests-262 · 252 pass · 10 skip` |
| `public/index.html:307` tile #1 | `162 / tests · 152 pass · 0 fail` | `262 / tests · 252 pass · 0 fail` |
| `public/index.html:309` tile #3 | `106 / rules · 2 layers · pre-LLM` | `131 / rules · 3 layers · pre-LLM` |
| `public/index.html:310` tile #4 | `~ / tokens saved · sealed in payload` | `500 / URLs · 99.6 % success · $0.75 cost (live stress)` |
| hero CTAs | only "Run the live pipeline" | add "Try the playground" + "Live dashboard" |
| README v0.6 section | absent | add "## ◆ v0.6.0 — Watch & Prove" before "## ◆ Honesty" |

---

## Edits to apply

### Edit 1 — `README.md:11` badge

Replace exactly this line:

```
![Tests](https://img.shields.io/badge/tests-162%20%C2%B7%20152%20pass%20%C2%B7%2010%20skip-brightgreen)
```

with:

```
![Tests](https://img.shields.io/badge/tests-262%20%C2%B7%20252%20pass%20%C2%B7%2010%20skip-brightgreen)
```

### Edit 2 — `README.md` new v0.6 section

Insert **before** the `## ◆ Honesty` section (search for that heading,
insert above it):

```markdown
## ◆ v0.6.0 — Watch & Prove

The chain-of-custody release. Every re-scrape of the same target now
encadena `previous_tsa_serial → current_tsa_serial`, with a normalized
content diff and a 7th PDF page when delta is present.

- **`src/delta/`** — Delta Engine: `normalize → hash → diff → sealDeltaChain`.
  35 unit + 1 integration tests.
- **`HMAC_EXCLUDED_KEYS`** (`src/prove/evidence-report.js`) — cross-run
  determinism: `kg_status`, `kg_latency_ms`, `surface_status` are normative
  metadata, excluded from the HMAC bytestring so the chain never reports
  a phantom change.
- **`src/forge/pii-filter.js`** — 25-rule PII bundle (10 DJL-PII reused +
  15 secrets-leak: AWS / GitHub / Stripe / JWT / etc.) gating Cognee ingest.
- **Model tier selector** (`src/classify/tiers.js`) — `free` / `oss` / `paid`.
  FREE labeled `free-low-quality` per `docs/v060-calibration.md` (50 % of
  fixtures had Δseverity > 1.5 vs DeepSeek baseline).
- **`/playground.html`** — try it yourself, paste a URL, pick a tier + lens,
  download the signed PDF.
- **`/dashboard.html`** — live stress KPIs, polls `.omc/state/v060-telemetry.jsonl`.
- **Live stress run** (2026-05-28): 500 URLs · 99.6 % success ·
  $0.75 cost · 9.1 min wall clock — see `docs/v060-stress-report.md`.
- **DigiCert TSA RTT baseline**: p95 385 ms — see `logs/digicert-rtt-baseline.json`.
- **`docs/PRIOR_ART.md`** — reproducible directed-search queries proving
  the "no open-source combination of [scrape + diff + HMAC + RFC 3161 + KG]
  found at 2026-05-28" claim.
- **`.kiro/specs/delta-engine.md`** — Kiro-native MCP spec for the Kiro
  Challenge integration.

```

### Edit 3 — `public/index.html` stat tiles

Find the `<div class="stats">` block at lines 306-310 (or nearby — locate
by the literal text `class="stat s-lime"`). Replace the 4 tile lines with:

```html
      <div class="stat s-lime"><div class="v">262</div><div class="l">tests · 252 pass · 0 fail</div></div>
      <div class="stat s-teal"><div class="v">6/6</div><div class="l">Bright Data surfaces · live</div></div>
      <div class="stat s-amber"><div class="v">131</div><div class="l">rules · 3 layers · pre-LLM</div></div>
      <div class="stat s-violet"><div class="v">500</div><div class="l">URLs · 99.6% · $0.75 · live stress</div></div>
```

### Edit 4 — `public/index.html` hero CTAs

Find this line (around line 217):

```html
    <div><a class="cta" href="#live">▶ Run the live pipeline</a></div>
```

Replace it with three CTAs (primary + two secondary):

```html
    <div class="cta-row">
      <a class="cta" href="#live">▶ Run the live pipeline</a>
      <a class="cta cta-secondary" href="/playground.html">Try the playground</a>
      <a class="cta cta-secondary" href="/dashboard.html">Live dashboard</a>
    </div>
```

Then, in the existing `<style>` block of `public/index.html`, append these
new rules at the very end (just before `</style>`):

```css
.cta-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;align-items:center;}
.cta-secondary{background:transparent;border:1px solid currentColor;color:inherit;}
.cta-secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
```

(If `.cta-row` or `.cta-secondary` already exist with different definitions,
do NOT redefine — keep the existing rules and skip this addition.)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `grep "tests-262" README.md` returns 1 hit (Edit 1).
- [ ] `grep "v0.6.0 — Watch & Prove" README.md` returns 1 hit (Edit 2).
- [ ] `grep '"v">262' public/index.html` returns 1 hit (Edit 3).
- [ ] `grep '"v">131' public/index.html` returns 1 hit (Edit 3).
- [ ] `grep '"v">500' public/index.html` returns 1 hit (Edit 3).
- [ ] `grep -c "/playground.html" public/index.html` returns >= 1 (Edit 4).
- [ ] `grep -c "/dashboard.html" public/index.html` returns >= 1 (Edit 4).
- [ ] `npm test` passes (262 / 252 / 0 fail) — no code logic should change.
- [ ] `npm run lint:slides` still passes (SLIDES.md untouched).
- [ ] `git diff --stat` shows exactly 2 files changed: `README.md` + `public/index.html`.

## Commit

Single atomic commit:

```
docs(ui): sync README + hero UI to v0.6.0 published numbers

- README.md badge: tests 162 → 262, 152 → 252 pass.
- README.md: new "v0.6.0 — Watch & Prove" section with links to delta/, PII filter,
  playground, dashboard, stress report, PRIOR_ART, .kiro/ spec.
- public/index.html: stat tiles refreshed (262 tests, 131 rules in 3 layers,
  500 URLs / 99.6% / $0.75 live stress tile replaces the old "tokens saved" tile).
- public/index.html: hero CTAs add "Try the playground" + "Live dashboard"
  alongside the existing "Run the live pipeline".

Spec source: .kiro/specs/readme-hero-v060-update.md (generated by Claude Opus 4.7,
executed by Kiro).

Co-Authored-By: Kiro <noreply@kiro.dev>
```

## Notes for Kiro

- Do **not** touch any other file. Especially do not touch `src/`, `test/`,
  `scripts/`, `.github/`, `package.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`.
- Do **not** reflow long lines in README — keep diff minimal.

  branch is already on `main`).
- Vercel auto-redeploys synthex.apohara.dev within ~30 s of the push.
